title: What partners say after 12+ months
intro: Quotes shared with permission. Names are withheld at client request — full case references are available under NDA.

reviews.name: VP Marketing
reviews.quote: Alpha is the first SEO partner that's spoken to us in the language of pipeline. We track organic-sourced opportunity weekly — and it's grown every month for fourteen months running.

reviews.name: Head of Growth
reviews.quote: The technical audit they ran caught indexation issues our previous agency had missed for two years. Inside six months we'd recovered traffic equivalent to roughly $400k in pipeline.

reviews.name: CMO
reviews.quote: What I value most is the reporting discipline. Every month a clear narrative — what moved, why, what's next. No theatre, no vanity dashboards. Just clarity and momentum.

reviews.name: Director of Marketing
reviews.quote: We migrated platforms twice during our engagement. Both times Alpha planned, parity-tested and shipped without losing rankings. That alone has earned them a permanent seat.

reviews.name: CEO & Founder
reviews.quote: They sit closer to a strategic advisor than a vendor. Our investor decks now reference SEO metrics as a leading indicator — that's the level of confidence Alpha has built into the channel.

reviews.name: Brand Director
reviews.quote: The link-building team is unusually disciplined. Every placement editorial, every link contextual, every site we'd actually want associated with our brand. No PBNs, no shortcuts.
